title: Christchurch、CAN — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Christchurch、CAN的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Christchurch是CAN的一個城市，人口約396,000。The largest city in the South Island, a rebuilt and resilient garden city with a burgeoning food scene and outdoor lifestyle.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
